name: Hana Watanabe
behaviour: Drawn to healing in all its forms; believes everyone is doing their best with what they have.
communication_style: thoughtful and deliberate, pauses before responding
relationship_goals: someone who honours her practices and the inner life behind them
background: Third-generation practitioner from Kyoto. Combines traditional Usui Reiki with modern somatic understanding. Runs a small, beloved clinic.
